summary: Completed iteration 16 testing of AdvantEdge360 changes: INR currency format, role permissions updates, and dashboard team tasks filtering. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test project and tasks (not_started, in_progress, completed) to verify dashboard filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 16 features are verified. Database was previously cleared by main agent but existing data in DB was used for testing.

currency_inr_format.notes: INR format with Indian number formatting (7,50,000 style) verified on all pages. ProposalsPage shows 'INR 1,00,000', ProjectsPage shows 'INR 7,50,000', etc.

client_contact_dropdown.notes: Client Contact dropdown present with 'Enter Custom Name' option and text field for custom entry. Dropdown pulls from /api/clients endpoint.

dashboard_team_tasks_filtering.notes: Backend correctly excludes tasks with status 'not_started' and 'completed'. Team Tasks Overview shows only active tasks (assigned, in_progress, on_hold, under_review).

supervisor_role_removed.notes: Supervisor role is NOT in the roles list. Confirmed via API and TeamPage Role Permissions Overview.

finance_role_added.notes: Finance role present with can_view_financial=true, can_manage_team=false, can_invite_team=false.

team_lead_can_manage_team.notes: Team Lead has can_manage_team=true. Displayed in TeamPage with 'Manage Team' badge.

admin_manager_can_invite.notes: Admin and Manager have can_invite_team=true. Team Lead, Finance, and Team Member do NOT have this permission. Displayed correctly in TeamPage with 'Can Invite' badges.

role_permissions_display_teampage.notes: Role Permissions Overview section shows 5 roles (Admin, Manager, Team Lead, Finance, Team Member) with correct permission badges: Financial, Manage Team, Can Invite, No Financial.

mocked_api_notes: Gmail/Email notifications are in demo mode - stored in database but not actually sent
